badges.label: Version
badges.logic: Shows this repository's internal date/time version in UTC using YYYY.MM.DD.HHMM format.

badges.label: UIOD
badges.logic: Shows the upstream UI Overhaul Dynamic version from the downloaded `descriptor.mod` `version` field, with Steam `timeupdated` and vendored-file content hash fallbacks.

badges.label: Stellaris
badges.logic: Shows the Stellaris supported version from the downloaded `descriptor.mod` `supported_version` field.

badges.label: Sync
badges.logic: Shows whether the vendored upstream files and generated patched files are in sync after the latest generator run.
